title: Gate Node
description: Graph node representing a workflow gate

id.description: Unique identifier for the gate node

evaluator_ref.description: Reference to the gate evaluator configuration or definition

satisfied.description: Whether the gate has been satisfied

blocked_at.description: Timestamp when the gate became blocked

blocked_reason.description: Human-readable reason for why the gate is blocked

payload.description: Additional data or payload associated with the gate evaluation
